Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Admissions And Reponses To Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories And For Monetary Sancitons
Off Calendar Feb-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Request For Admissions, And Responses To Plaintiff's First Set Of Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
